[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up shows the upper half of an anime-style light-haired character’s face partially obscured by a large, ribbed object in the foreground.  

The main subject is a pale-skinned anime-style head with shoulder-length light hair and reddish-brown eyes, with the face cropped at the top edge and the right side of the face largely blocked by a gray, horizontally ribbed object. The character’s eyes are open and directed forward, with a small red mark on the cheek and minimal facial detail visible due to the obstruction. A dark, rectangular area appears behind the character’s hair on the left side of the image.  

The setting appears to be indoors or a simple interior scene, suggested by the plain, muted background with no clear outdoor elements. Lighting is soft and even, with the foreground object casting slight shading near the character’s face. The camera angle is very close and slightly off-center, focusing on the character’s eyes while the ribbed object dominates the right side of the composition.  

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.  

Practical Summary: The image shows a close-up of an anime-style character’s face with light hair and red-brown eyes. A large gray, ribbed object partially blocks the view of the character’s right side.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
